name: desiderio-shadcn-theme
title: Desiderio shadcn Theme
description: TYPO3-ready shadcn/ui token files, Tailwind v4 source, and Site Settings for Desiderio content elements.

files.content:
categories:
  desiderio:
    label: 'Desiderio'
  # Appearance first — the theme preset is the headline control most editors look for.
  desiderio.shadcn:
    label: 'Theme'
    description: 'Choose the site theme preset — colours, corner radius, density, and icons. Switching it repaints the whole site at runtime, no rebuild.'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.theme:
    label: 'Appearance'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.typography:
    label: 'Typography'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.layout:
    label: 'Layout'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.brand:
    label: 'Brand'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.header:
    label: 'Header'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.footer:
    label: 'Footer'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.search:
    label: 'Search'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.seo:
    label: 'SEO'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.news:
    label: 'News'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.tracking:
    label: 'Tracking'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.consent:
    label: 'Consent'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.styleguide:
    label: 'Styleguide'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.editorial:
    label: 'Editorial'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.forms:
    label: 'Forms'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.elementLibrary:
    label: 'Element Library'
    parent: desiderio

settings:
  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Brand
  desiderio.brand.wordmark:
    label: 'Wordmark'
    description: 'Text rendered as the header and footer brand mark. Scenario presets set this to the active template name.'
    type: string
    default: ''
    category: desiderio.brand

  desiderio.brand.tagline:
    label: 'Footer tagline'
    description: 'Short line rendered below the footer wordmark.'
    type: string
    default: 'Built with shadcn/ui Fluid components for TYPO3 14.'
    category: desiderio.brand

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Layout
  desiderio.layout.density:
    label: 'Vertical density'
    description: 'Spacing rhythm for sections and content frames.'
    type: string
    enum:
      compact: 'Compact'
      comfortable: 'Comfortable'
      spacious: 'Spacious'
    default: comfortable
    category: desiderio.layout

  desiderio.layout.container:
    label: 'Container width'
    description: 'Maximum width of the main content column.'
    type: string
    enum:
      narrow: 'Narrow (768px)'
      wide: 'Wide (1280px)'
      full: 'Full width'
    default: wide
    category: desiderio.layout

  desiderio.layout.radius:
    label: 'Border radius'
    description: 'Global corner rounding for cards, buttons, inputs. Use preset when the shadcn preset should own the radius.'
    type: string
    enum:
      preset: 'Use shadcn preset'
      none: 'None'
      sm: 'Small'
      md: 'Medium'
      lg: 'Large'
      full: 'Full'
    default: preset
    category: desiderio.layout

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Header
  desiderio.header.style:
    label: 'Header style'
    description: 'Visual treatment for the site header.'
    type: string
    enum:
      solid: 'Solid'
      transparent: 'Transparent overlay'
      glass: 'Glass (blurred)'
      sticky: 'Sticky solid'
    default: solid
    category: desiderio.header

  desiderio.header.fixedPosition:
    label: 'Pin header on scroll'
    description: 'Keep the site header pinned to the top of the viewport while scrolling.'
    type: bool
    default: false
    category: desiderio.header

  desiderio.header.breadcrumb:
    label: 'Show breadcrumb navigation'
    description: 'Render a breadcrumb trail below the site header on every page. Long trails collapse to home, an ellipsis, and the last two pages.'
    type: bool
    default: true
    category: desiderio.header

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Footer
  desiderio.footer.style:
    label: 'Footer style'
    description: 'Visual treatment for the site footer.'
    type: string
    enum:
      columns: 'Columns'
      centered: 'Centered'
      minimal: 'Minimal'
      mega: 'Mega (full-width)'
    default: columns
    category: desiderio.footer

  desiderio.footer.copyrightText:
    label: 'Copyright text'
    description: 'Optional custom footer copyright line. Leave empty to render the current year and site title.'
    type: string
    default: ''
    category: desiderio.footer

  desiderio.footer.legalPageIds:
    label: 'Legal page IDs'
    description: 'Comma-separated list of pages for the legal footer menu, for example imprint, privacy, accessibility.'
    type: string
    default: ''
    category: desiderio.footer

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Search
  desiderio.search.enabled:
    label: 'Show search in header'
    description: 'Render a compact search form in the site header.'
    type: bool
    default: true
    category: desiderio.search

  desiderio.search.targetPageId:
    label: 'Search result page ID'
    description: 'Optional page ID that receives the header search request. Empty falls back to the site home page.'
    type: string
    default: ''
    category: desiderio.search

  desiderio.search.queryParameter:
    label: 'Search query parameter'
    description: 'GET parameter used by the header search form. Use q for Solr-style search pages.'
    type: string
    default: q
    category: desiderio.search

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- SEO
  desiderio.seo.defaultDescription:
    label: 'Default meta description'
    description: 'Fallback description used when a page record has no SEO description.'
    type: string
    default: ''
    category: desiderio.seo

  desiderio.seo.defaultRobots:
    label: 'Default robots meta'
    description: 'Fallback robots directive for pages that do not override indexing settings.'
    type: string
    enum:
      'index,follow': 'Index, follow'
      'noindex,follow': 'No index, follow'
      'index,nofollow': 'Index, no follow'
      'noindex,nofollow': 'No index, no follow'
    default: 'index,follow'
    category: desiderio.seo

  desiderio.seo.defaultImage:
    label: 'Default sharing image URL'
    description: 'Absolute image URL used for Open Graph and Twitter cards when no extension-specific image is available.'
    type: string
    default: ''
    category: desiderio.seo

  desiderio.seo.structuredDataEnabled:
    label: 'Emit WebSite structured data'
    description: 'Adds a small JSON-LD WebSite record with SearchAction when search is enabled.'
    type: bool
    default: true
    category: desiderio.seo

  desiderio.seo.robotsTxtEnabled:
    label: 'Render robots.txt'
    description: 'Enables the Desiderio robots.txt page type. The site route enhancer still has to map robots.txt to type 201.'
    type: bool
    default: true
    category: desiderio.seo

  desiderio.seo.sitemapPath:
    label: 'Sitemap path'
    description: 'Path appended to the site base URL in robots.txt.'
    type: string
    default: sitemap.xml
    category: desiderio.seo

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- News
  desiderio.news.useLoadMore:
    label: 'Use load-more lists'
    description: 'Default for shadcn-styled EXT:news list templates. Individual plugins can still override the value.'
    type: bool
    default: false
    category: desiderio.news

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Tracking
  desiderio.tracking.enabled:
    label: 'Tracking scripts present'
    description: 'Shows the consent banner and exposes the visitor choice to custom tracking integrations.'
    type: bool
    default: false
    category: desiderio.tracking

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Consent
  desiderio.consent.message:
    label: 'Consent message'
    description: 'Short banner text shown only when tracking is enabled.'
    type: string
    default: 'We use optional cookies to measure and improve this website.'
    category: desiderio.consent

  desiderio.consent.privacyPageId:
    label: 'Privacy page ID'
    description: 'Optional page ID linked from the consent banner.'
    type: string
    default: ''
    category: desiderio.consent

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Appearance
  desiderio.theme.darkModeDefault:
    label: 'Default colour scheme'
    description: 'Which colour scheme to show before the visitor chooses one.'
    type: string
    enum:
      light: 'Light'
      dark: 'Dark'
      system: 'Follow system preference'
    default: system
    category: desiderio.theme

  desiderio.theme.darkModeToggle:
    label: 'Show dark-mode toggle'
    description: 'Render a sun/moon toggle in the header.'
    type: bool
    default: true
    category: desiderio.theme

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Theme
  desiderio.shadcn.preset:
    label: 'Theme preset'
    description: 'The site theme. Switching this repaints the whole site — colours, corner radius, and control density — at runtime through the data-shadcn-preset body attribute, with no rebuild. Values are preset ids from the create page on ui.shadcn.com plus the bundled house presets. Run npm run shadcn:sync-fluid only to also adopt a different structural style recipe (focus ring, transitions, base classes).'
    type: string
    enum:
      b4hb38Fyj: 'b4hb38Fyj — Olive product system'
      b0: 'b0 — Default neutral'
      b3IWPgRwnI: 'b3IWPgRwnI — Mist dashboard'
      b6G5977cw: 'b6G5977cw — Lyra mono olive'
      b27GcrRo: 'b27GcrRo — Rhea modern neutral'
      aurora: 'Aurora — violet'
      marine: 'Marine — blue'
      forest: 'Forest — emerald'
      ember: 'Ember — orange'
      bloom: 'Bloom — rose'
      lagoon: 'Lagoon — teal'
      gold: 'Gold — amber'
      midnight: 'Midnight — indigo'
      blossom: 'Blossom — pink'
      citrus: 'Citrus — lime mono'
      custom: 'Custom (extend shadcn-theme.css)'
    default: b6G5977cw
    category: desiderio.shadcn

  desiderio.shadcn.style:
    label: 'shadcn/ui style (advanced)'
    description: 'Advanced / build-time only. The live look follows the selected preset; this just records the shared structural base used the last time npm run shadcn:sync-fluid ran. Editing it here has no runtime effect, so it is read-only.'
    readonly: true
    type: string
    enum:
      radix-vega: 'Vega'
      radix-nova: 'Radix Nova'
      radix-maia: 'Maia'
      radix-lyra: 'Lyra'
      radix-mira: 'Radix Mira'
      radix-luma: 'Luma'
      radix-sera: 'Sera'
      radix-rhea: 'Rhea'
      custom: 'Custom'
    default: radix-lyra
    category: desiderio.shadcn

  desiderio.shadcn.iconLibrary:
    label: 'Icon library'
    description: 'SVG icon family used to render semantic Desiderio icon keys. Stored content keeps stable icon keys, so this can be changed later without rewriting content records.'
    type: string
    enum:
      lucide: 'Lucide'
      tabler: 'Tabler Icons'
      hugeicons: 'HugeIcons'
      phosphor: 'Phosphor Icons'
      remixicon: 'Remix Icon'
    default: tabler
    category: desiderio.shadcn

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Typography
  desiderio.typography.fontSans:
    label: 'Sans-serif font'
    description: 'Default body font pair.'
    type: string
    enum:
      preset: 'Use shadcn preset'
      inter: 'Inter'
      geist: 'Geist'
      system: 'System UI'
      serif: 'Serif (override)'
    default: preset
    category: desiderio.typography

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Styleguide
  desiderio.styleguide.enabled:
    label: 'Enable styleguide template'
    description: 'Render the Styleguide page template. Leave off in production unless you actively curate the styleguide.'
    type: bool
    default: false
    category: desiderio.styleguide

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Editorial
  desiderio.editorial.readingProgress:
    label: 'Reading progress bar'
    description: 'Show a sticky reading-progress indicator at the top of editorial article pages. Updates as the reader scrolls the article body.'
    type: bool
    default: true
    category: desiderio.editorial

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Forms
  desiderio.forms.receiverAddress:
    label: 'Receiver email address'
    description: 'Recipient used by the bundled TYPO3 Form definitions.'
    type: string
    default: hello@example.com
    category: desiderio.forms

  desiderio.forms.receiverName:
    label: 'Receiver name'
    description: 'Human-readable recipient name used by the bundled TYPO3 Form definitions.'
    type: string
    default: Website team
    category: desiderio.forms

  desiderio.forms.senderAddress:
    label: 'Sender email address'
    description: 'Envelope sender used by the bundled TYPO3 Form definitions. Keep this on a domain your mail transport may send for.'
    type: string
    default: no-reply@example.com
    category: desiderio.forms

  desiderio.forms.senderName:
    label: 'Sender name'
    description: 'Human-readable sender name used by the bundled TYPO3 Form definitions.'
    type: string
    default: Website forms
    category: desiderio.forms

  desiderio.forms.friendlyCaptchaTestMode:
    label: 'Friendly Captcha test mode'
    description: 'Simulate successful Friendly Captcha verification (inert placeholder widget, validation passes). In TYPO3 Development context (e.g. ddev) this is the automatic default and the setting is not needed; enable it for other non-production contexts such as Testing. Production always uses the real captcha.'
    type: bool
    default: false
    category: desiderio.forms

  desiderio.forms.friendlyCaptchaForceReal:
    label: 'Force real Friendly Captcha in Development'
    description: 'Development context bypasses the captcha by default so forms work without keys on ddev. Enable this to force the real Friendly Captcha widget and validation even in Development — e.g. to test real site/API keys locally. Wins over the automatic bypass and over test mode.'
    type: bool
    default: false
    category: desiderio.forms

  desiderio.forms.brevo.enabled:
    label: 'Enable Brevo form sync'
    description: 'Synchronise successful bundled TYPO3 Form submissions with Brevo. Configure BREVO_API_KEY outside site settings.'
    type: bool
    default: false
    category: desiderio.forms

  desiderio.forms.brevo.listIds:
    label: 'Brevo list IDs'
    description: 'Optional comma-separated Brevo contact list IDs that successful form contacts should be added to.'
    type: string
    default: ''
    category: desiderio.forms

  desiderio.forms.brevo.strict:
    label: 'Require Brevo sync'
    description: 'Cancel the form success flow when Brevo returns an error. Leave disabled for resilient public forms.'
    type: bool
    default: false
    category: desiderio.forms

  desiderio.forms.brevo.trackEvent:
    label: 'Track Brevo form event'
    description: 'Send a Brevo custom event with sanitized submitted field values after contact sync.'
    type: bool
    default: true
    category: desiderio.forms

  desiderio.forms.brevo.eventName:
    label: 'Brevo event name'
    description: 'Custom event name used for successful form submissions. Brevo allows letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.'
    type: string
    default: desiderio_form_submit
    category: desiderio.forms

  desiderio.forms.brevo.doubleOptInTemplateId:
    label: 'Brevo double opt-in template id'
    description: 'Id of the Brevo DOI email template. When set (together with list ids), newsletter signups use the Brevo double opt-in flow: the contact only joins the list after confirming the email. Empty disables DOI and contacts are created directly.'
    type: string
    default: ''
    category: desiderio.forms

  desiderio.forms.brevo.doubleOptInRedirectUrl:
    label: 'Brevo double opt-in redirect URL'
    description: 'Absolute URL the subscriber lands on after confirming the double opt-in email. Optional; the Brevo template default applies when empty.'
    type: string
    default: ''
    category: desiderio.forms

  # ------------------------------------------------------- Element Library
  # Visual-editor element picker: the storage folder seeded by
  # desiderio:library:seed and the typeNum used to render single-element
  # previews. The picker endpoint (ElementLibraryMiddleware) and the
  # elementLibraryPreview PAGE in setup.typoscript read these.
  elementLibrary.storagePid:
    label: 'Element Library storage folder'
    description: 'Page uid of the "Element Library" sysfolder created by desiderio:library:seed. Only records below this folder are renderable through the preview page type and listed by the element library endpoint.'
    category: desiderio.elementLibrary
    type: int
    default: 0

  elementLibrary.previewTypeNum:
    label: 'Element Library preview page type'
    description: 'typeNum of the standalone single-element rendering used for visual picker previews.'
    category: desiderio.elementLibrary
    type: int
    default: 1777200001

# Default values for the Desiderio base set.
# Presets override these in their own settings.yaml.

styles:
  templates:
    templateRootPath: EXT:desiderio/Resources/Private/FluidStyledContent/Templates/
    partialRootPath: EXT:desiderio/Resources/Private/FluidStyledContent/Partials/
    layoutRootPath: EXT:desiderio/Resources/Private/FluidStyledContent/Layouts/

desiderio:
  brand:
    wordmark: ''
    tagline: 'Built with shadcn/ui Fluid components for TYPO3 14.'
  layout:
    density: comfortable
    container: wide
    radius: preset
  header:
    style: solid
    fixedPosition: false
  footer:
    style: columns
    copyrightText: ''
    legalPageIds: ''
  search:
    enabled: true
    targetPageId: ''
    queryParameter: q
  seo:
    defaultDescription: ''
    defaultRobots: index,follow
    defaultImage: ''
    structuredDataEnabled: true
    robotsTxtEnabled: true
    sitemapPath: sitemap.xml
  news:
    useLoadMore: false
  tracking:
    enabled: false
  consent:
    message: 'We use optional cookies to measure and improve this website.'
    privacyPageId: ''
  theme:
    darkModeDefault: system
    darkModeToggle: true
  shadcn:
    preset: b6G5977cw
    style: radix-lyra
    iconLibrary: tabler
  typography:
    fontSans: preset
  styleguide:
    enabled: false
  forms:
    receiverAddress: hello@example.com
    receiverName: Website team
    senderAddress: no-reply@example.com
    senderName: Website forms
    friendlyCaptchaTestMode: false
    friendlyCaptchaForceReal: false
    brevo:
      enabled: false
      listIds: ''
      strict: false
      trackEvent: true
      eventName: desiderio_form_submit

docs: Install this item only into a TYPO3 extension that follows the Desiderio Content Blocks structure. Raw preset color values belong in shadcn-theme.css; templates, icons, and JavaScript consume semantic shadcn variables.
